env.name: INFERGATE_CONFIG_PATH
env.purpose: location of the mounted gateway config

config_mounts.name: gateway-config
config_mounts.purpose: routing, admission limits, tenant tiers, backend pool
config_mounts.reload_semantics: atomic snapshot swap on change; in-flight requests finish on the snapshot they started with; zero dropped streams (fault scenario fs-08); effective within the config-publish SLO (<= 5s)

warm_up.warm_signal: config snapshot loaded and the initial health probe of every configured backend has completed (gateway warm-up = knowing where it can route)

pre_stop.action: fail /readyz immediately, stop accepting new requests, let in-flight streams run to completion (fault scenarios fs-05/fs-12)

secrets.name: usage-db-credentials
secrets.purpose: usage settlement database DSN (delivered as INFERGATE_USAGE_DB_DSN)

secrets.name: api-key-signing-key
secrets.purpose: verifies tenant API keys; rotation must take effect within the key-revocation SLO (<= 5s)

notes: Example fixture; digest and versions illustrative. The gateway is GPU-free by construction (gpu.count=0) and serves no model (model_mount=null).
